ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Continued To Oct-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jay Greene appeared via zoom for Nicole Guilfoyle (executor).

Mr. Greene stated that he is waiting for the loan to close and requesting a continuance to file the final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to October 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 10, 2014, is admitted to probate. Nicole Guilfoyle is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 09, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
